investigation.scope: Git history analysis for Postgres migration infrastructure

head_commit.message: fix(app): resolve 6 pre-push typecheck errors — i18n declarations + missing locale keys

dimensions.name: Commits adding .pg.sql.ts files
dimensions.naming_convention: <domain>.pg.sql.ts — parallel to SQLite <domain>.sql.ts; uses pgTable() from drizzle-orm/pg-core

dimensions.name: Commits modifying drizzle config
dimensions.result: ZERO commits for drizzle.config.pg.ts; drizzle.config.ts committed with SQLite dialect
dimensions.drizzle_config_pg_status: DOES NOT EXIST on disk — claimed to have been created by session reports but never committed and lost from working tree
artifact_claims_reviewed: docs/json/opencode/evidence/pg_ddl_generated.v1.json — claims drizzle-kit generate ran against drizzle.config.pg.ts
docs/json/opencode/plans/final_closures_plan.v2.json — plans to create drizzle.config.pg.ts with postgresql dialect

dimensions.name: CI workflow changes for Postgres testing
dimensions.result: NO .github/workflows/ directory exists in this repository
dimensions.note: CI is managed outside this repo. No postgres service containers, no test.yml, no pg-specific workflows.

working_tree_definitions.signature: export async function applyMigrations(db: PgClient): Promise<void>

working_tree_consumer.note: JsonMigration import replaced with applyMigrations comment

dual_dialect_implementation.pglite_path: readMigrationFiles() + manual exec() loop on raw client

cross_cutting_observations.finding: All PG migration work is uncommitted
cross_cutting_observations.detail: Zero files from the Postgres backend migration (PG-001) have been committed. All schema files, adapter code, migration scripts, and CLI commands exist only in the working tree from parallel agent sessions.

cross_cutting_observations.finding: Working tree files at risk of loss
cross_cutting_observations.detail: 4 files referenced in evidence artifacts no longer exist on disk: drizzle.config.pg.ts, migration.sql, snapshot.json, coordination.pg.sql.ts. The remaining 10+ files could be lost between sessions if the working tree is cleaned.

drizzle.config.ts uses SQLite dialect with .sql.ts glob. #db alias in committed package.json points to db.bun.ts. The working tree has modified package.json pointing #db to db.pg.ts, but this is uncommitted.

cross_cutting_observations.finding: 12 artifact files document uncommitted work in detail
cross_cutting_observations.detail: The session reports and evidence artifacts in docs/json/opencode/ provide comprehensive SHA256-verified documentation of what was built, including DDL contents, adapter patterns, typecheck baselines, and architectural claims.

roadmap_context.title: Postgres Backend Migration (Phase 1.7a)
completed_milestones: Postgres schema definitions — .pg.sql.ts files exist for all 7 domains (plus 2 extras: schema, coordination)
DatabaseAdapter.Service — single access path wired in adapter.ts
defaultLayer — backend selection based on OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL env var
remaining_milestones: migration-pg/ DDL — needs regeneration via drizzle-kit generate
